sources.excerpt: Official Chaatwala homepage identifies the Herndon restaurant at Elden Street 1050, ZIP 20170, with pickup and delivery.

Current official Herndon menu lists 62 available food and nonalcoholic products across ten categories and instructs guests with allergies or dietary restrictions to contact the team for food-specific information.
Restaurant-linked Fleksa pickup and delivery ordering surfaces serve the same Chaatwala Herndon identity and current catalog.
Official menu contains no item-level certified allergen values and gives only a contact-the-team instruction for food-specific allergy information.
Inspected official sitemap/document, PDF, image, FAQ, nutrition, ingredient, allergen, and downloadable surfaces; no official allergen matrix was found.
Inspected restaurant-linked Fleksa ordering surfaces and structured menu fields; no populated allergen matrix or cross-contact disclosure was found.
Targeted web searches for the restaurant and official domain found the official contact-on-request statement but no official matrix, nutrition sheet, ingredient sheet, or PDF.

proposedChanges: Replace the malformed mixed parser catalog with the 62 current official Herndon food and nonalcoholic products, remove people/page/category artifacts and stale products, consolidate equivalent Gol Guppa and Gulab Jamoon presentations, and mark direct allergen evidence unavailable while retaining the official contact-on-request notice.
